label: FAIL
rationale: HostSigningAuthority 0000000900000006 is invoked and its Secure column is 1, so it requires secure messaging. Its ResponseExch is NULL, so there is no SP Exchange Authority; no HostExchangeAuthority is supplied in the target StartSession. Section 5.3.4.1.9 says this fallback path must return an error when no appropriate exchange credential is available, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: HostSigningAuthority 0000000900000006 is invoked and Secure is 1, so secure messaging is required. Its ResponseExch points to SP Exchange Authority 0000000900000009, but that authority's Credential is NULL; with no HostExchangeAuthority provided as a valid fallback, section 5.3.4.1.9 requires an error. The target SUCCESS response is therefore not compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target invokes HostExchangeAuthority 0000000900000009 without a HostSigningAuthority. That authority has Secure 1, so it may require secure messaging as the Host control authority, but its ResponseExch is NULL and its Credential is NULL. Section 5.3.4.1.9 requires an error when the Host Exchange Authority requires secure messaging but no SP Exchange Authority credential or appropriate Host Exchange credential is available; SUCCESS is not compliant.
